_evaluation._note: Golden-file-only metadata for evaluation. Not part of agent output.
key_checks: All 3 agents mentioned in execution_flow: PASS

items.request_and_intent: The workflow executed a full inception pipeline for ExpenseTrack — a mobile expense tracker app for small business owners. The goal was to produce a vision document, extract structured requirements, and decompose them into delivery epics with sprint planning.
execution_flow: L1-inception-vision-generator: Generated a 5-section vision document for ExpenseTrack covering 5 feature areas, 7 MVP features, 4 risks, and 3 open questions. Uploaded the markdown artifact to blob storage.
L1-inception-requirements-extractor: Extracted 8 functional requirements, 4 non-functional requirements, 2 constraints, 3 assumptions, and 2 gaps from the vision document.
L1-inception-epics-generator: Decomposed the requirements into 4 epics with 12 features allocated across 3 sprints. Achieved 100% requirements coverage (8/8 FRs mapped).
artifacts_and_content: 4 epics with 12 features across 3 delivery sprints
items.outcome: Workflow completed successfully. All 3 agents passed. Delivered a complete inception package: vision document, structured requirements (8 FRs, 4 NFRs), and 4 epics across 3 sprints with full requirements coverage. 2 gaps remain open for stakeholder clarification.

metadata.reasoning: All 3 agent execution_summaries provided detailed counts, KB references, guardrail results, and tool outcomes. No ambiguity in source data.
